title: Frontier Bridge Fleet Registry (fleet/v1)
description: The machines an operator owns and how to reach them (RFC 0005). Files with real reachability belong in fleet/local/ (gitignored).

hwprofile.description: Committed hwprofile id; null until fleet detect produces one.

reach.description: null means this machine (local) or manually operated.

ssh.description: Any ssh destination (user@host); the wire (Tailscale, LAN) is not the fleet layer's business.

workdir.description: Repo checkout on the remote; default ~/Frontier-Bridge.
